query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sensor_api_keys` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `apiKey` varchar(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `active` enum('yes','no') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'yes',
  `lastUsedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `requestCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `clients_auth` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `passwordHash` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `company` varchar(200),
  `phone` varchar(20),
  `emailVerified` enum('yes','no') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'no',
  `emailVerifyToken` varchar(64),
  `emailVerifyExpires` timestamp NULL,
  `passwordResetToken` varchar(64),
  `passwordResetExpires` timestamp NULL,
  `status` enum('active','suspended','pending') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `assignedProjectIds` json,
  `lastLoginAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,

  `requestCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `clients_auth` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `passwordHash` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `company` varchar(200),
  `phone` varchar(20),
  `emailVerified` enum('yes','no') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'no',
  `emailVerifyToken` varchar(64),
  `emailVerifyExpires` timestamp NULL,
  `passwordResetToken` varchar(64),
  `passwordResetExpires` timestamp NULL,
  `status` enum('active','suspended','pending') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `assignedProjectIds` json,
  `lastLoginAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
